# Styr.ing — Full Product Documentation

## Product Overview

Styr.ing is a Norwegian governance SaaS platform for board management, regulatory compliance, and internal control. It serves as a central workspace where board members access board documents, track regulatory deadlines, manage internal controls, and collaborate on governance tasks.

### Problem Solved

Norwegian companies managing board governance through email attachments, shared drives, and manual spreadsheets face:
- 47+ hours/year lost to administrative board tasks (estimated)
- Missed regulatory deadlines (Brønnøysund, Finanstilsynet, Datatilsynet)
- Incomplete internal control documentation for audits
- Version chaos with board documents across multiple email threads

### Solution Architecture

Styr.ing consolidates three governance domains into one platform:

1. **Board Portal** (`/board`) — Digital board books, member management, meeting scheduling, document sharing with version control and audit logs
2. **Compliance Calendar** (`/compliance`) — Regulatory deadline tracking with automated reminders for Norwegian authorities
3. **Internal Control Register** (`/internkontroll`) — COSO-based control framework, risk assessment, deviation tracking

### Regulatory Coverage

- **Aksjeloven (Companies Act)**: Board meeting requirements, documentation standards
- **GDPR/Personvern**: Privacy compliance, data processing agreements
- **Brønnøysundregistrene**: Annual reports, entity filings
- **Finanstilsynet**: Financial supervision requirements
- **CSRD/ESRS**: Sustainability reporting (EU directive)
- **Internkontrollforskriften**: Internal control regulations for Norwegian enterprises

## Technical Architecture

### Frontend
- **Framework**: Astro 4
- **Output**: Static HTML (no SSR dependency)
- **Styling**: CSS custom properties, system-ui + Georgia font stack
- **Markup**: Semantic HTML5 with aria labels
- **Forms**: Client-side JavaScript with Paperclip webhook integration

### Hosting
- **Platform**: Cloudflare Pages
- **Custom Domain**: styr.ing
- **SSL**: Cloudflare-managed
- **Caching**: Edge caching with cache-control headers

### Database (Planned)
- **Type**: Cloudflare D1 (SQLite at edge)
- **Tables**: boards, board_members, meetings, compliance_events, control_items, demo_requests, subscriptions
- **Current State**: Demo data only (database provisioning pending)

### External Services
- **Contact Form**: Paperclip webhook endpoint
- **Email**: Resend (planned)
- **Payments**: Stripe (planned)
- **Auth**: Planned (login/signup pages exist as static stubs)

## Page Structure

| Route | Page | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `/` | Landing | Marketing page with hero, features, pricing, pilot CTA, contact form |
| `/board` | Board Portal | List of demo boards with status indicators |
| `/board/[id]` | Board Detail | Single board with members, meetings, stats |
| `/compliance` | Compliance Calendar | Regulatory deadline table with status tracking |
| `/internkontroll` | Internal Control | Control items list with COSO framework status |
| `/admin` | Admin Dashboard | Demo stats, request tracker |
| `/login` | Login | Authentication page (static stub) |
| `/signup` | Sign Up | Registration page (static stub) |

## Pricing Model

- **Base price**: 2,490 NOK/month per board (excl. VAT)
- **Billing**: Monthly invoicing
- **Pilot program**: Free for up to 3 companies until June 30, 2026
- **Included**: Unlimited board members, all features, email support
- **Not included**: Custom integrations, dedicated support, white-label

## Competitive Landscape

Styr.ing targets the Norwegian SMB governance market, competing with:
- Manual solutions (email + spreadsheets) — the primary competitor
- Generic project management tools repurposed for board work
- Enterprise governance platforms (too complex and expensive for SMB)

Differentiation: Norwegian-first, built for local regulations, simple pricing, no enterprise sales cycle.

## Development Status (May 2026)

- **Live**: Full static website with all marketing and demo pages
- **Deployed**: Cloudflare Pages (styr.ing)
- **Demo data**: All pages functional with realistic Norwegian demo content
- **Blocked**: Database provisioning (D1), Stripe integration, email pipeline, production auth
- **Next milestone**: First paying pilot customer

## API Endpoints (Planned)

- `POST /api/demo-request` — Submit demo request from contact form
- `GET /api/boards` — List user's boards (auth required)
- `GET /api/boards/:id` — Board detail with members and meetings
- `POST /api/boards` — Create new board
- `POST /api/meetings` — Schedule meeting
- `POST /api/stripe/checkout` — Create Stripe checkout session

## SEO/GEO Configuration

- llms.txt: https://styr.ing/llms.txt
- llms-full.txt: https://styr.ing/llms-full.txt
- robots.txt: https://styr.ing/robots.txt
- Sitemap: https://styr.ing/sitemap.xml
- JSON-LD: Organization, SoftwareApplication, WebSite, FAQPage schemas
- AI crawler access: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended all allowed
